questionHtml:
The diagram represents the cell walls of Gram-positive and Gram-negative bacteria.

Label the layers I, II and III.
markschemeHtml:
l. peptidoglycan 

ll. outer membrane/layer of lipopolysaccharide and protein 

lll. peptidoglycan
